name: spix-mcp
description: Give any MCP-compatible AI client a real phone number. Make outbound AI voice calls, send email, manage contacts, and retrieve transcripts — all from Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client.

SPIX_API_KEY.description: Your Spix API key — get one at app.spix.sh/settings/api-keys

SPIX_DEFAULT_PLAYBOOK.description: Default playbook ID to use for calls (optional)

SPIX_TOOL_PROFILE.description: Tool profile: 'safe' (default, 43 tools) or 'full' (49 tools including destructive ops)
